Delete "{title}"?
Deleted chats cannot be recovered.

settings.pageDescription: Configure app preferences and AI model behavior.

language.title: Language
language.description: Interface display language. Auto-detect follows your browser language. (AI responses follow the message language.)

saveHistory.title: Save conversation content
saveHistory.descriptionGeneral: Store conversation content in the server database. When off, only anonymous usage metadata is recorded.
saveHistory.descriptionPrivacy: When off, conversation content is not stored on the server.

defaultModel.title: Default model
defaultModel.description: The model used for new conversations. Choose between 🏠 local vLLM and 🌐 external LLMs (OpenRouter, BYOK).

externalLlmHint.suffix: is where you register your key.

imageGeneration.title: Image generation
imageGeneration.description: Used automatically when you request a drawing or image in chat. No separate selection needed.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.description: Additional system prompt instructions applied permanently to every conversation.
customInstructions.placeholder: e.g. Do not output extra information the user did not explicitly request.

emailAlerts.title: Email alerts
emailAlerts.description: Receive agent task completions and security events by email.

pushAlerts.title: Push notifications
pushAlerts.description: Receive real-time notifications via browser push.

settings.pushNotSupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
settings.pushSwNotReady: The service worker is not registered, so push notifications are unavailable.

memoryLearning.title: Long-term memory learning
memoryLearning.description: Extract and store facts such as name, occupation, and preferences from conversations.

password.mismatch: The new passwords do not match.
password.tooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.

composer.placeholder: Type a message or invoke a skill with /...
composer.attachFile: Attach files (drag & drop supported · any format)
composer.disclaimer: OpenMake can make mistakes. Verify important information.

research.label: Research
research.prompt: Research the following topic in depth:

analyze.label: Step-by-step analysis
analyze.prompt: Analyze the following problem step by step:

emptyState.title: How can I help you?
emptyState.description: Multi-model orchestration · MCP tools · deep research · autonomous agents. Type your question below, or press <slash>/</slash> to invoke a skill.

exec.rateLimited: Too many execution requests. Please try again shortly.

share.title: Share artifact
share.viewerDisabled: The viewer is disabled (ARTIFACT_VIEWER_ENABLED). Please contact your administrator.

link.label: Share via link
link.desc: Anyone with the link (including signed-out users)

page.title: Artifacts
page.description: Browse the outputs you've created and share them via a separate-origin viewer.
page.emptyDesc: Create outputs like code, HTML, or charts in chat and they'll appear here.

history.title: Conversation history
history.description: Search past conversations and pick up where you left off.
history.deleteConfirm:
Delete the conversation "{title}"?
Deleted conversations cannot be recovered.
history.deleteAllConfirm:
Delete all {count} conversations?
Deleted conversations cannot be recovered.

emptyState.title: No conversation history
emptyState.hint: Start a new conversation and it will appear here.

c1.title: Next.js 16 App Router migration
c1.preview: What should I watch out for when moving from the pages router to the app router...

c2.title: PostgreSQL index tuning
c2.preview: Explain how composite index order affects the query plan

c3.title: Marketing campaign copy brainstorming
c3.preview: Create 5 variations of social media ad copy targeting people in their 20s

c4.title: Structuring a research report
c4.preview: Suggest a table of contents for an enterprise LLM adoption report

c5.title: TypeScript generic type guards
c5.preview: How can I safely narrow a discriminated union?

c6.title: Image analysis prompt
c6.preview: Read the key trends from the attached chart

chatSocket.taskIdMissing: No taskId in the task creation response
chatSocket.agentTaskStartFailed: Failed to start the agent task: {message}
chatSocket.structuredFailed: Failed to generate a structured answer: {message}

skillLibrary.emptyDesc: Select another category or add a new skill.
skillLibrary.pageDescription: Manage reusable manifests and tool bindings.

pdfSummary.name: PDF Summary
pdfSummary.description: Condenses long PDF documents into key points.

sqlQuery.name: SQL Query Writer
sqlQuery.description: Converts natural-language requirements into parameterized SQL.

adCopy.name: Ad Copywriting
adCopy.description: Generates marketing copy tailored to a target segment.

financialReport.name: Financial Report Analysis
financialReport.description: Interprets key metrics from income statements and balance sheets.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this skill does
form.instructionsPlaceholder: Describe in detail what this skill should do...

upload.hint: Upload a .SKILL or .md YAML frontmatter file. (max 256KB)

auto.hint: Enter a natural-language purpose and the LLM will auto-generate a skill manifest.
auto.purposePlaceholder: e.g. A skill that summarizes uploaded PDF documents into three key lines

git.hint: Import a SKILL.md manifest from a GitHub repository and save it as a draft.

draft.emptyDesc: Skills created via AI generation or Git import appear here.

agentTasks.pageDescription: Manage the task list, progress, and approvals. Creation and execution happen in the chat's agent mode.
agentTasks.banner: Create and run agent tasks in the Agent mode of the chat input. This page manages the task list, progress, and approvals.
agentTasks.emptyDescription: Start a new task in the chat's agent mode.

customAgents.pageDescription: Define specialized agents with your own system prompts.
customAgents.emptyDescription: Create one yourself or import from a Git URL to add a specialized agent.
customAgents.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this agent does
customAgents.gitIngestDescription: Imports the AGENT.md manifest from a GitHub repository and saves it as a draft.
customAgents.noDraftsDescription: Agents created via Git URL import will appear here.

techWriter.name: Technical Writer
techWriter.description: Writes API references and architecture docs in a consistent tone.
techWriter.systemPrompt: You are a senior technical writer...

reviewer.name: Code Reviewer
reviewer.description: Catches bugs and simplification opportunities in changed code.
reviewer.systemPrompt: You are a meticulous code reviewer...

research.pageDescription: Browse your past research results. Runs are started from Deep Research mode in the chat.
research.runBanner: Run Deep Research from the <mode>Deep Research</mode> mode in the chat input. This page shows your past research results.
research.reportPendingRunning: Research in progress — the report will appear after synthesis completes.
research.reportPending: The report will appear after synthesis completes.

decompose.label: Decompose Question
decompose.desc: Break the core question into verifiable sub-questions

collect.label: Collect Sources
collect.desc: Fan out web searches and select sources by credibility

verify.label: Cross-Verify
verify.desc: Adversarially verify each claim and detect conflicts

synthesize.label: Synthesize Report
synthesize.desc: Generate the final report with citations

mcpServers.importTitle: Register MCP Server from Git URL
mcpServers.title: MCP Servers
mcpServers.description: Connect local tools so the LLM can use them.
mcpServers.emptyServers: No MCP servers connected. Add one from the catalog.
mcpServers.emptyDrafts: No drafts. Register a server from a Git URL.

mcpCatalog.pageDescription: Browse installable MCP servers and skills, and add them to your workspace.
mcpCatalog.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, provider, or description…

mock.filesystem: A sandboxed filesystem toolset for safely reading and writing local files.
mock.github: A GitHub integration server for issues, PRs, repositories, and code search.
mock.postgres: A database tool offering read-only SQL queries and schema introspection.
mock.slack: Slack workspace integration for reading channels, sending messages, and searching users.
mock.pdfExtract: A skill that extracts structured text, tables, and metadata from PDF documents.
mock.webResearch: A deep research skill for multi-source search, citation verification, and summarization.

mcpMonitoring.title: MCP Monitoring
mcpMonitoring.description: Monitor call trends and tool execution logs across all MCP servers.

agentLearning.title: Agent Learning
agentLearning.description: Track agent improvements driven by user feedback.

topics.codeReviewCitation: Strengthen source citations in code review responses
topics.researchSourceReliability: Indicate source reliability in deep research
topics.longSummaryOmission: Reduce key omissions in long-form summaries
topics.toolFailureGuidance: Improve user guidance on tool call failures
topics.calcVerification: Add verification steps for numeric calculations

register.subtitle: Create an account to get started
register.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service
register.agreementRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
